text:
The Solid-Gold Execution Sword (, Junkin no Shokeitō—lit. "Pure-Gold Execution Sword") is an item that was auctioned off at the Underground Auction. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 11, Chapter 100 

Appearance

The Solid-Gold Execution Sword is a curved, ornate blade with several etchings engraved into the metal. 

Background

It can be presumed that the sword was used in the past as a weapon that carried out executions. In later times, it was stored in the Yul National Treasury. 

Plot

Yorknew City arc

At the start of the Underground Auction, Pakunoda wheels out the sword on a cart as the auctioneer (controlled by Shalnark) introduces it as the first item up for auction and goes on to detail its place of origin. The bidding for the item quickly climbs to 50 million. Unbeknownst to the Mafia attendees, the auctioned sword was a copy of the original made by Kortopi.
